caption: Make an application
heading: Choose an application
noticeText: You cannot apply to suspend (stop or delay) the eviction online.

noticeTextList.readTheGuidance: read the guidance explaining how to suspend the eviction (GOV.UK, opens in a new tab)
noticeTextList.fillInTheForm: fill in the N244a form
noticeTextList.findYourLocalCourt: find your local court
noticeTextList.sendTheFormToTheCourt: send the completed form to the court, or deliver it by hand

question: What do you want to apply for?

adjourn.label: Ask to adjourn the hearing (move it to a later time or date)
adjourn.hint: You can apply to change the court hearing until a later time or date

setAside.label: Ask the court to set aside (cancel) a decision the court has made
setAside.hint: You can ask the court to set aside its order if you have good reason. For example, if you were unable to attend the court hearing because you were ill

somethingElse.label: Something else
somethingElse.hint: Make an application for something that is not listed above

errors.typeOfApplication: Choose what you want to apply for
